title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
